languages.text:
{n}Лицо Янура кривится в презрительном оскале:{/n}{br}
"Комиссарские речи, Ваша Светлость. Но как знаете. Плакать по вам я не буду. И никто из нас не будет".

{n}Janur's face twists into a contemptuous grin:{/n}{br}
"Commissar words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But suit yourself. I won't weep for you. None of us will."
languages.original_text:
{n}Лицо Янура кривится в презрительном оскале:{/n}{br}
"Комиссарские речи, Ваша Светлость. Но как знаете. Плакать по вам я не буду. И никто из нас не будет".

{n}Janur's face twists into a contemptuous grin:{/n}{br}
"Commissar words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But suit yourself. I won't weep for you. None of us will."

{n}Janur's face twists into a contemptuous grin:{/n}{br}
"Commissar words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But suit yourself. I won't weep for you. None of us will."

{n}Janur's face twists into a contemptuous grin:{/n}{br}
"Commissar words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But suit yourself. I won't weep for you. None of us will."

languages.text:
{n}ジャヌールの顔は嘲笑に歪む。{/n}{br}
「お言葉は御意でございます。しかし、ご勝手に。私はあなたのために泣くことはございません。誰も泣くことはございません」
languages.original_text:
{n}Janur's face twists into a contemptuous grin:{/n}{br}
"Commissar words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But suit yourself. I won't weep for you. None of us will."

traits.locale_text:
ジャンヌの顔は嘲笑に歪む。
「お言葉は御意でございます。しかし、ご勝手に。私はあなたのために泣くことはございません。誰も泣くことはございません。」

languages.text: {n}Janur'un yüzü, küçümseyici bir sırıtışla çarpılıyor.{/n} "Komiser lafları {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Keyfiniz bilir. Arkanızdan ağlamayacağım. Hiçbirimiz ağlamayacak."
languages.original_text:
{n}Janur's face twists into a contemptuous grin:{/n}{br}
"Commissar words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But suit yourself. I won't weep for you. None of us will."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur'un yüzü, küçümseyici bir sırıtışla çarpılıyor.{/n} "Komiser lafları {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri. Keyfiniz bilir. Arkanızdan ağlamayacağım. Hiçbirimiz ağlamayacak."

languages.text:
{n}El rostro de Janur se retuerce en una mueca de desprecio:{/n}{br}
«Esas son palabras de Comisario, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Usted mism{mf|o|a}. No lloraré por usted. Ninguno de nosotros lo hará».
languages.original_text:
{n}Janur's face twists into a contemptuous grin:{/n}{br}
"Commissar words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But suit yourself. I won't weep for you. None of us will."

traits.locale_text:
{n}El rostro de Janur se retuerce en una mueca de desprecio:{/n}{br}
«Esas son palabras de Comisario, mi{mf|lord|lady}. Usted mism{mf|o|a}. No lloraré por usted. Ninguno de nosotros lo hará».

languages.text:
{n}雅努尔脸上露出一抹轻蔑的笑容。{/n}{br}
“这是政委会说的话啊。不过随您便吧，大人，我们不会为您流泪的。”
languages.original_text:
{n}Janur's face twists into a contemptuous grin:{/n}{br}
"Commissar words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But suit yourself. I won't weep for you. None of us will."

traits.locale_text:
{n}雅努尔脸上露出一抹轻蔑的笑容。{/n}{br}
“这是政委会说的话啊。不过随您便吧，大人，我们不会为您流泪的。”

languages.text:
{n}Le visage de Janur se fend d'un sourire dédaigneux :{/n}{br}
« Des paroles de commissaire, Votre Seigneurie. Enfin, ça m'est égal. Personne ici ne vous pleurera, certainement pas moi. »
languages.original_text:
{n}Janur's face twists into a contemptuous grin:{/n}{br}
"Commissar words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But suit yourself. I won't weep for you. None of us will."

traits.locale_text:
{n}Le visage de Janur se fend d'un sourire dédaigneux :{/n}{br}
« Des paroles de commissaire, Votre Seigneurie. Enfin, ça m'est égal. Personne ici ne vous pleurera, certainement pas moi. »

languages.text:
{n}Janur verzieht sein Gesicht zu einem verächtlichen Grinsen:{/n}{br}
"Kommissarische Worte, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}. Aber wie Ihr meint. Ich werde nicht um Euch weinen. Das wird keiner von uns."
languages.original_text:
{n}Janur's face twists into a contemptuous grin:{/n}{br}
"Commissar words, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. But suit yourself. I won't weep for you. None of us will."
